title: Generate a Docusaurus docs site for the repo's human docs
description: Single-instance site that reads the repository's docs folder DIRECTLY (no copying, no sync, no aggregation): the site tree IS the docs folder you already edit.

directory.description: Workspace-relative directory of the site project. Default: packages/tools/<name>.

docPath.description: Workspace-relative folder holding the human docs the site serves.

packageName.description: package.json name of the site project. Default: <name>.

baseUrl.description: Base URL path (GitHub Pages project sites need '/<repo>/').

repoUrl.description: Repository URL for the navbar GitHub link.
